title: Morambaa
desc: Reva and Rama are best friends who share an unbreakable bond. However, they find themselves in a trivial place when they fall in love with the same man.

title: Halad Rusali Kunku Hasalaa
desc: Krishna, a village belle weighed down by family responsibilities, encounters Dushyant, a city boy. His arrival promises to bring light and change to her challenging world.

title: Gharoghari Matichya Chuli
desc: A family's mother-in-law dynamics take a heartwarming twist when she moves into her daughter's cozy home, blending tradition, love, humor, and everyday revelations.

title: Tuhi Re Mazha Mitwa
desc: A woman, strongly opposed to arranged marriages, gets married to a man against her choice. Years later, their marital bliss is interrupted with the arrival of his former lover.

title: Aanandii
desc: Young Aanandii cannot see, but she lives with hope and courage. When fate brings her into the powerful Nimbalkar family through marriage, she must face many challenges that test her strength.

desc: Nandini and Parth are set to marry, but a tragedy on their wedding day alters their future, forcing them to confront unexpected challenges as they navigate a new, uncertain life together.
